titleStmt.title: SII 15.73: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 73. (B.K. No. 145 of 1926-27.) HOṀBAḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Śaṅkaraliṅga.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 10, Monday, Saṅkramaṇa. The date corresponds to 1189 A.D., July 24. But there was no Saṅkramaṇa on that day. The regnal year cited would yield 1187 A.D., as the initial year of the king which is rather too late.

It registers a gift of land made by the teacher Rudraśakti of the Kāḷāmukha order after purchasing it from the One Hundred and Twenty Mahājanas of Pombuḷcha for worship and offerings in the temple of Kumāra-Bontēśvara constructed by him in the agrahāra of Poṁbolal in memory of his preceptor Vāmaśakti. The record describes a line of teachers of the Kāḷāmukha sect in the Beḷḷeya-santāna and Parvatāvaḷi as follows: Bonteyamuni to whom are attributed several miracles one of which is said to have been performed in the court of Jayasiṁha-Chakravarti. His chief disciple was Avadhūta who had the following junior colleagues, Kēdāraśakti, Mallikārjuna, Mūṟujāvi, Nirvāṇayōgi, Vāmadēva or Vāmaśakti, Siddhēśvara, Rudraśakti and Kriyāśakti. Vāmaśakti had three disciples, viz., Bonteyaguru, Mallikārjuna, and Rudraśakti, the donor. Various other gifts made to the same deity on the same occasion by the local artists, Aṟuvattokkalu, merchants, etc., are also recorded. Poṁbuḷcha and Poṁboḷal occurring in the inscription are the earlier forms of the name of Hoṁbaḷ. The epigraph is also interesting on account of its literary merit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśirascuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . yasyōnmēṣanimēṣābhyāṁ jagataḥ praḷayōdayē .
taṁ śakticakravibhavaṁ prabhavaṁ śaṁkaraṁ numaḥ . vritta . Idu bhūdēviya cenna poṁnamakuṭaṁ tāneṁbinaṁ peṁpuvettudadhivyāvritamāgi
śōbhisuva jaṁbūdvīpa madhyapradēsadoḷoppi¨rppudu mēru mēruvina teṁkalu bhārata kṣētrami¨rppudu tadbhāratava¨rṣadoḷsogayisi¨rkkuṁ kuṁtaḷō¨rvvītaḷaṁ . Adu
cāḷukyara janmabhūmiyadaṟoḷu muṁ puṭṭi satyāśrayādi diḷīpōpama cakrava¨rttigaḷanē ka¨rddhātriyaṁ dha¨rmmadiṁ paduḷaṁ pāḷisutirdu pō
da baḷikīgaḷtaṁna sau¨ryyavaḷēpadinī dhātriyaneydepāḷisidapaṁ sōmēsvarō¨rvvīśva raṁ kaṁ . kuvaḷayamaṁ tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaraṁ karaṁ nijakaradiṁThis letter is written below the line
da vikāsamappinaṁ pāḷivettu pāḷisutumiṟdaniḷe pogaḷvinagaṁ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśra yaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka śrīmaccāḷukya cakrava¨rtti tri
bhuvanamallavīrasōmēśvaravijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . vṛtta . vasudhege bhūribhūdharapayōdharegujvaḷadēvadī¨rgghi kāvasanege kuṁtaḷākritiyeni¨rppudu kuṁtaḷadēśavalli śōbhi
suvudu beḷvalaṁ tiḷakadaṁtadaroḷkamanīyakāntiyaṁtesadu mahāgrahāramenisi¨rppudu poṁboḷalū¨rjjitō¨rjjitaṁ . kaṁda . Adu celvina neleyenisi¨rppudu muṁnaṁ nōḷpajanake baḷiki¨rppa jana¨rkkadu sukhadā
karamenisi¨rppudu poṁboḷalagrahāracūḍāratnaṁ . va . Adeṁteṁdaḍe . vṛtta . baḷadoṟagiṟda keyvolada ka¨rvvina tōṁṭada pūgoḷakke ba¨rppaḷigaḷa pūta saṁpageya kāyteḷadeṁgina paṇta māvinutkaḷikeyanāṁta kōgileya poṁba
ḷavotte kavuṁginoppamaggaḷisire poṁboḷalvoṟavūḷaltaḷadoppadinoppi tōṟuguṁ . matta madu . vṛtta . navasaṁgītadinoppi tō¨rppa sivagēhabrātadiṁ laṁjikānivahakkrīḍeyaṁ nānta ha¨rmyacayadiṁ vistārakānēkavastuvi
śēṣaṁgaḷoḷoṁdidaṅgaḍigaḷiṁ paurāṁganāmaṁgaḷavyavasāyaṁgaḷinantaraṁgadoḷavoppi¨rkkuṁ karaṁ poṁboḷalu . mattamadu . vritta . vēdaninādapūritadiśāvaḷayaṁ kritamaṁga ḷābhiśēkōdakapāvanāvanitaḷaṁ makhahōmasamu
ttha dhūmasaṁpādita kāḷimāṁkitenabhasthaḷameṁdumideṁdu biccataṁ mēdini mecci baṇnipudu poṁboḷalaṁ neredagrahāramaṁ . vṛtta . Adaroḷu nūri¨rppadiṁba¨rssadamaḷacaritāḷaṁ krita¨rvviśvavidyāvidarudyatkī¨rtticaṁcadhvajararikuḷahṛ
tkīḷa vajrānana¨rssatyadayādha¨rmmāśraya¨rssaṁśrita sakalajanādhārari¨rppa¨rmmahāpuṇyada bījaṁgaḷsamaṁtondeḍeyoḷa neredi¨rppaṁdadiṁ lōkapūjyaru . kaṁda . Avarivarannade kayyāṁtava¨rgīva¨rmmaṟege vandaraṁ kāva¨rkkāyva
varaṁ kiḍipa¨rvva¨rṇnisa bhuvanaṁ nūṟippadimbaremba mahātmaru . vacana . Iṁtu bhūmiyoḷu bhūmisāramuṁ prabhusāramuṁ dha¨rmmasāramumāgi mahāgrahāraṁ peṁpuvettiḻdudu kaṁnda . Antenisida poṁboḷalo
ḷu boṁteyamuni kāḷamukhamunīsvaranatiniściṁtātmanāgi beḷḷeya santānaṁ negaḷda pa¨rvvatāvaḷiyi¨rppaṁ . va . Ā kaliyuga siddhalakuḷīśvarāparanāmadhēyanenisida mahānu bhāva prabhāvadoḷe doreyēnendaḍe . vritta . ©
© śrīgiriyoḷpodaḷduriva sū¨ryyaśiḷātaḷadoḷnidāghadoḷu bēge taguḷdu nāldeseyoḷaṁ suḍe niścaḷacittanāgi sū¨ryyāgamanakke sanmukhadinū¨rdhvamukhaṁ nile keyyanetti kaṇḍāgaḷe sū¨ryyanittu sakaḷajñateyaṁ muni
boṁtegaḻkaṟiṁ . kaṁda . nuḍika¨rtṟuvādamaṁ toḍa¨rddaḍe dēvamanuṣyayakṣarākṣasaroḍa nādaḍavoṁdanugrahaṁ geydaḍe dinapaṁ paḍedanalte bonteyamunipa . vacana . Antu paḍedu sakaḷasāma¨rthyabharitanuṁ śiva
dha¨rmmaniratanumāgi . vritta . barutuṁ pa¨rvvatadiṁde poka� deyaṁ liṁga pratiṣṭhā¨rtthama baradoḷkiccurivaṁtu ni¨rddaḷidu hōmaṁ geydu vidviḍadharāmararaṁ kay�ugivaṁtu māḍi śivaliṁgasthāpanaṁ geydanaccariyappaṁtu
jagakke boṁtayamunīṁdraṁ viśvalōkastutaṁ . Adalladeyuṁ . vṟitta . karahaḍadoḷbaruttu mire . bhikṣege baṭṭeyoḷo¨rvvanuddhataṁ surigeyanāṁtutūgi hiḍi bhikṣeyaneṁdi ṟivante geyvuduṁ ka
ragi rasaṁbholā surige pātrayoḷirdaḍe pī¨rddu pōdanaccariyane lōkavēṁ piriyanō muni boṁtaya dēvanājñeyoḷu . va . Adalladeyuṁ . kaṭakadoḷvihārisuttuṁ jayasiṁha dēvara maneyoḷcakrava¨rtrige
purōva¨rttiyūgi¨rppa samayadoḷu . vritta . parasamayaṁgaḷoḷnegaḻda tā¨rkkikarellaru mi¨rddu nīṁ narēśvaravibhayoḷsama¨rtthisuva ka¨rttruvarūpamadeṁtuṭenda nū¨rvvaroḷamanitta rūpenisi nindu niruttararā
gi māḍi bittarasidanalte boṁteyamunīśvara nīśvara ka¨rtruvādamaṁ . va . Aṁtu cakra va¨rttiya sabheyoḷsakaḷasamayanirākaraṇamukhadiṁ ka¨rtruvādicakravartiyeṁba pesaraṁ pettu matta
mā rājadhāniyoḷu yōgīśvaraṁ boṁteyaguru vihārisuttuṁ bare . kaṁda . madakariya nēṟi ba¨rppavanidiroḷu kaṁḍelele boṁteya kaṇḍeya nīyeṁbudu mikke neladoḷadanā mada kari baṁdetti muḷgi
biḷdudu dhareyoḷu . va . Ādalladeyuṁ mattamo¨rmme tī¨rtthayūtrānimittaṁ nānā dēśaṁgaḷoḷvihārisuttuṁ bandoṁdu divasaṁ . kaṁda . ceriyisutuṁbare kollāpuradoḷmuni boṁta bhikṣeyaṁ jōgi
ṇi kāydurivaṁ baliyaṁ piḍiyene pariharisede koṁḍu kuḍidaḍavaḷurideṟdaḷu . va . mattamanē kavismayūvahaṁgaḷappa prabhāvaṁgaḷiṁ va¨rttisuttumi¨rddoṁdu samayadoḷu . vṛtta . pariharisalke bāradu śubhāśubhaka
¨rmamanuṁḍaḍallade doreyarumeṁbudaṁ jagake bicca tamūgire pēḷva mūḷkeyiṁ jvaramoṭage taṁdu tannoḷire kaṁtheyoḷaṁtadanikki dēvatāsmaraṇeyoḷi¨rddanēṁ piriyanō guru bonte tapaṟprabhāvadoḷu . kaṁda . bē
ṟūri rasātaḷadūḷaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷmoḷetu desegaḷoḷu taḷtu nabhakkōraṁte miḷi¨rdu baḷevuda hōrātraṁ kī¨rttilatike būṁteyamuniyaṁ(ya) . vacana . Intu negaḷtevettu . kaṁda . nirupamarenisida boṁteya gurugaḷgaṇimādi guṇagaṇānvita
¨rgge manōharanenisi sakaḷavidyāpariṇatanavadhūtadēvanādaṁ śiṣyaṁ . va . Ā mahānu bhāvaṁ . kaṁda . piṁgade naṟuguṁdadoḷaṁ gaṁgeyoḷaṁ grahaṇakāladoḷcariyise lōkaṁ gaṁgeyayyanene negaṟdaṁ guṇiyavadhūta
dēvanabhinavavibhavaṁ . prativādinivahadīpapratatipradhvaṁsavipuḷajhaṁjhūvātaṁ kritamatiyava dhūtaṁ viśrutavākpati ka¨rtruvādimukhamukuruṁda . Iṁtu negaṟtevetta . vritta . Anavadyaṁ
gavadhūteyōgiganuja¨rkkēdāraśakti prabhāvanidhānaṁ nutamallikā¨rjjunanudāttaṁ mūṟu jāvibratīṁdranaghaughacchidudāttamā¨rgganirataṁ ni¨rvvāṇayōgīśvaraṁ janavaṁdyaṁ yati vāmadēvananaghaṁ yō
gīśanāmāṁkitaṁ . kaṁda . nayamā¨rgaṁ siddhēśvaranayaniyamaṁ rudraśakti sakaḷakaḷā saṁśrayanū¨rjjitaṁ kriyāśaktiyiva¨rttāvādarakhiḷaguṇasaṁsēvyaru . vacana . Iṁtavadhūta dēva pramukha
śiṣyasaṁsēbyamūnapādāraviṁdaruṁ . parivritamunīṁdrabṛṁdarumāgi . kaṁda . śrijiyi sida¨rssakaḷaguṇabrajamaṁ taṁdoṁdu māḍi kaṁthācā¨ryya¨rnnijamahimeyinosede savaṁtu jagaṁnutanenipa vāma
śaktibratiyaṁ . vritta . Oḍavuṭṭiddakhiḷāgamaṁ sakaḷata¨rkkaṁ śabdaśāstraṁ peṟa¨rppoḍavaṭṭā gaḷe cittadoḷbageda mātaṁ pēḷva vijñānadoḷu nuḍiyārādhise sū¨ryyanoḷpaḍeda tatvā bhyāsamā taṁdeyoḷpaḍiyeṁ
baṁtire vāmaśaktiyesadiḷdaṁ ka¨rtṛvādīśvaraṁ . vṛtta . parasamayaṁgaḷoḷnegaḷda ta¨rkkada mātuḍugittu kūḍe catvaravaṭhadēvatābhavanarājagrihaṁgaḷoḷolda māḷkeyiṁ niravisi pēḷva nāṭakada
kābyada nītiya balmeyallaroḷpariharisittu vādimukhada¨rppaṇaniṁ sale vāmaśaktiyiṁ . vṛtta . bratadīkṣāvidhikuṁḍamaṁḍaḷavidhānaṁ liṁgapīṭhakramaṁ pratimādūṣaṇapōṣaṇaṁ bhuva
nakōśaṁ vāstu bhūdayvasaṁsthiti bhūbhēda parīkṣe dēvanivahaprāsādameṁbāgamasthita vidyāvaḷi vāmaśaktimuniyiṁ vikhātya māytu¨rvviyoḷu . vacana . Iṁtu sakaḷavidyā saṁpannaruṁ bhāktikajana pra
saṁnaruṁ . ka¨rtṛvādīśvararuvārādhitaviśvēśararumenisi negaḷtevetta vāmaśaktidēva¨rggaura sa putrarenisi . kaṁda . janiyisida¨rbbonteyaguru manumā¨rggaṁ mallikā¨rjjunaṁ sakaḷa kaḷābhinutanamarēśvaraṁ pāvanacari
taṁ rudraśaktiyeṁba¨rttanayaru . kandha . Ā vāmaśaktidēva¨rggāvi¨rbhavisi¨rdda sutaroḷagrima sutanu¨rvvīnutakī¨rtti sakaḷakṣmāvaniyoḷu rudraśaktidēvaṁ negaḷdaṁ . vritta . gurukuḷavā
¨rddhiva¨rddhanasudhākaranātmakuḷōllasatsarōvaravararājahaṁsanagajāramaṇāgamaśaiḷakēḷikē sari viṣayāvaḷiprabhavamōhamahālatikālavitranandorevudu rudraśaktimuni
puṁgavanaṁ dhare meccibiccataṁ . vṛtta . hareyada rūpinēḷgeyoḷamubbaṭeyiṁ tapameṁdu kāypiniṁ smaraniradeydi pūgaṇege kaydare bhōṁkene tattapōgni nibbaramaṟeyaṭṭi muṭṭi suḍe biṭṭabhimānamanō
ḍi pōdanī dhare nage taṁnanā negaḷda rudranenuttama rudraśaktiyaṁ . vritta . rasava¨rggatyāga mēkāṁtaravuṇasaduvaṁ mūru tuttalliyuṁ bhūtasamūhakkoṁdu bhāgaṁ baliyane nega
ḷdīghōravīraṁ tapaṁ māṇise du¨rvvārēṁdriyōdrēkamanavicaḷitēkāgracittaṁ samaṁta ¨rccisi niccaṁ rudraśakti bratipati paḍedaṁ rudranoḷu taṁna meccaṁ . vṛtta . gurudha¨rmmā caraṇaṁ dayā
nuśaraṇaṁ prāgbhūtaduḥka¨rmmasaṁharaṇaṁ saṁśritasādhuva¨rgabharaṇaṁ viśvēśvarāṁghridvayasmaraṇaṁ sa¨rvvajanōpakārakaraṇaṁ nōḷpāgaḷī yāṟuvābharaṇaṁgaḷsale rudraśakti munipaṁgoppi
ḷduvī dhātṛ(tri)yoḷu . vacana . Iṁtu sakaḷaguṇabharitanuṁ . vairāgyaniratanuṁ . śivapada bhaktanuṁ . bhaktānuraktanene negaḷtavetti¨rddu . kaṁde . guru vāmaśaktidēvara parōkṣavina yakke rudraśaktimu
nīśaṁ haraliṁgasthāpanamaṁ dhare baṇnisuvaṁtu māḍidaṁ poṁboḷaloḷu . va . Antu prati ṣṭheyaṁ māḍi kumārabontēśvarameṁdu pesariṭṭu . vritta . Udayisidātmavaṁśamadu pāvana miḷda guhādridēva
tāsadanavanāḷi pāvanataraṁ sale meṭṭida bhūmisasyasaṁpadavati yo¨rmme muṭṭida jaḷāśaya vū¨rjjita tī¨rtthameṁba peṁpodavire rudraśaktimuni tāḷdidanapratimaprabhāvamaṁ . vacana . Ā mahā
nubhāvana tapaḥprabhāvaprādu¨rbbhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . vritta . kṣame tannoḷu mū¨rttigoṁḍuṁ nati baḷedu nayaṁgoṁḍu mikkā¨rppu kaykoṁḍu mahatvaṁ biṇpugoṁḍu prabhuteyanoḷa koṁḍīśatatvaṁ manaṁgoṇḍa
maḷa śrīkū¨rmmegoṁḍujjvaḷa ghanayaśamaṁ tāḻdikoṁḍintu lōkōttamanādaṁ vāmaśakti bratipatitanujaṁ rudraśaktibratīṁdraṁ . vṛtta . paramajñānadhanaṁ tapōdhananabhīṣṭā¨rttha pradānaṁ dhanaṁ sthi
rasatyaṁ dhananū¨rjjitabratadhanaṁ śāṁtatvadoḷtaddhanaṁ varamā¨rggaṁ dhananīśatatvadhananudyettēja vādaṁ dhanaṁ dhare mōkṣaṁ dhananeṁdu baṇnisuvudu śrī rudraśaktīśanaṁ . Aṁgajana pratāpa dodavaṁ neṟe bhaṁ
gisi tannoḷāda saṁgaṁgaḷa vāṁccheyaṁ toradumiṁdriyava¨rggada bērakittu mōhaṁgaḷe pāśamaṁ paridu cittadoḷīśananoldu tāḻdidaṁ jaṁgamarudranu¨rvvareyoḷo¨rvvane boṁtaya rudraśaktigaḷ . vri .
tī¨rcci parōkṣadoḷpitṛge māḍuva satkriyeyaṁ virakti meyve¨rccire saṁgamaṁ toṟedu pādukamaṁ balavaṁdu bhaktiyiṁda¨rccisi keṅgaṇabbeya padaṁgaḷanāgaḷe rudraśakti baṁda¨rcci sutiḷdanaṁdu naṟugundada beṭṭadoḷiddu sū
¨ryyana . vṛtta . Uriyanuguḷva bēsageyoḷiḷduṟe kāydaṟeyoḷbaḷikke pe¨rmmara moda loḷkeḷalda maḷegāladoḷiḷdu baḷikke śītamabbarisida māgiyoḷbayaloḷiddu nirāvaraṇaṁ niraṁnanuddhuratapadiṁ triva¨rṣami
re kaṁḍinanā muni rudraśaktiyaṁ . kaṁda . dhareyoḷśivāgamaṁ vistarisire pala¨rgaṟiye pēḷdu śivapadapūjāparanāgaṇimādigaḷoḷu neredapenīnandinantirōhitanādaṁ . kaṁda . tadanaṁtaravudi yisa bōdhadīpti tadgi
riya du¨rggiyaṁ bīḷkoṁḍu manōmudadiṁ cariyisutiddaṁ suda¨rśanaṁ rudrasaktidēvaṁ jagadoḷu . © Ā mahānubhāvanappa rudraśaktidēvaṁ śrīmanu mahāgrahāraṁ poṁbu ḷcadaśēṣamahā
janaṁ nūṟi¨rppadiṁbarumaṁ dha¨rmmā¨rtthaṁ prā¨rtthisi drabyanivēdanaṁ geyyalava¨rddhāre sahitaṁ kuḍalu paḍedu śrīmaccāḷukyacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvava¨rṣada mūṟeneya
saumyasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 10 sōmavāra saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu śrī kumāra bontēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōganaivēdya khaṇḍasphuṭita jī¨rṇnōddhārakkaṁ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāraṁ sa¨rvvanamaśyamāgi
biṭṭabhūmiya pramāṇa Ūra kōla samakaṭṭinoḷūriṁ baḍagaṇa poleyamageṟeyiṁ baḍagaṇa narasiṁhadēvara keyiṁ baḍagalumpaḍuvaluṁ beḷvoḍeya holada mēreyiṁ mūḍalu poḷdi¨rddamatta
rippattanālku yiṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ nūṟi¨rppadiṁbaruṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ kāydu pratipāḷisi naḍasuvaru . © śrīrudraśaktidēvarā puṇyadinadalu beḷvoḍeya Ūroḍeya rāyarasena maga kāḷimarasa
numaṁ . Ammarasana maga rāyarasenumaṁ . dha¨rmmū¨rtthaṁ prā¨rtthisi dravyanivēdenaṁ geyyala varu śrī kumāra boṁtēsvaradēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdyakkeṁdu sa¨rvvanamasyaṁ sa¨rvvabādhā parihāramā
gi śrīmadaśēṣamahājanaṁ nūṟi¨rppadiṁbara saṁnidhānadalu śrīrudraśaktidēvara kālaṁ kaḷci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa bhūmiya pramāṇameṁteṁdaḍe hoṁboḷala kōla samakaṭṭi noḷāvūra ho
lada mēreyiṁ paḍuva kī¨rttyādityadēvara keyiṁ baḍaga mattarāṟu . Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ nūṟi¨rppadiṁbaruṁ pratipāḷisi naḍesuvaru © Iṁtī vrittiyaṁ rudraśaktidēvara sikṣeya makkaḷu
śrī kumāra boṁtēśvaradēva¨rgge biḍisidavaradāreṁdaḍe navilūra saṁkarabbe . kavaḍara cendi seṭṭi meyyalommattaru . mūlaramūraṇa mattereraḍu . dhāravāḍada kabbaḷamūkayya matta reraḍu . kabbaḷa kalla
yya mattaroṁdu . baysara billaṇa mattaraidu Ubbajiyara kallayya temma cendayya . teneyara . guḍḍaṇa . taṁmana samaṇa . niṭṭila siṁgaṇa . jaridara nāgaṇa . kaṇṇiyara kētaṇa . kaluvara kallaṇa . sinda
vaḷḷiya teraḷiya lakumaṇa . naragara gaurave . naragara caṁdagāvuṁḍa . heḍavaraicaṇa . kēsaḷara javanaṇa . māsiyaraicaṇa . baḷagāṟa kētaṇa . sāsala hogarara nāraha . ka¨rmmāṟaicōja . navilguṁdadujvaḷaballeya nā
yakanintivarallaṁ meyyaloṁmattaraṁ biḍisidaru . © mattamū puṇyadivasadalu sa¨rvva jaṇōpakāravappa vyavasāyigaḷenisida poṁbuḷcadaṟuvattokkaluṁ vokkalaloṁdu māḍa hoṟe baṇnigegoḷagamaṁ biṭṭar .
Ūra taḷavāra nāyakaṁ mukhyamāgiyāḷaloṁdu hoṟeyaṁ biṭṭaru nakaraṁgaḷu caitradalu hāga pavitradalu hāga saṭṭuga bhatta dēvara vīḷeyakkaṁgaḍiyaloṁdaḍake yeraḍeleyaṁ biṭṭar .
haṁnavaṇagaru caitradalu bēḷa pavitradalu bēḷeyaṁ biṭṭaru . kaṁcagāṟaṟu dēvarupakaraṇaṁgaḷellamaṁ kūliyaṁ koḷḷade māḍi kuḍuvaṁtāgi biṭṭaru . maḍivaḷarellaṁ vokkalaloṁdu hoṟeyaṁ
biṭṭaru . kuṁbāṟarokkalaloṁdāvage galanaṁ biṭṭaru . mattamā puṇyadivasadalūre taḷavāra nāyakaṁ tannalli khaṇḍugabhattamumanāḷalayguḷa bhattamaṁ biṭṭaru . Ālada sēṇi garu caitradalu hāga
pavitradalu hāgamaṁ biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
